days.notes: Cancelled inbound flight due to sleet
Shop for winter gear + bag for Rachel. Red eye RDU-LHR, flew out on AA 174 at 8:45 PM

Landed LHR 9:20 AM. Rachel and Brian split from Sarah, who picked up posters elsewhere in London. B/R checked in to hotel, and shortly later Sarah arrived before they all went to ExCel/Docklands for Festival of Genomics. Exhausted, then delirious. Networking
Networking + talks + posters @ FoG. Met Jan-Philip Mallm (PI at DKFZ). Connected with Eleni (Lifebit), Rachael De Vries (novoSTAR/Ole Winther lab)

regions.name: Copenhagen (Visit 1)
regions.summary: A quick, freezing, relaxing visit before all the trains in Germany

days.notes: Fly to Copenhagen from LGW. Met Lid @ Vestamager station by their house. Sent cold emails to CPH contacts. Ashnikko concert in evening.
Relax. Freezing (-10C + wind). Hot baths on waterfront in evening.
Sarah leaves. See city
Brian has coffee with Rachael De Vries near Nørreport
Train CPH central → Heidelberg (8:08 AM–6:23 PM). Breakfast of bread + cheese next to station, long ride w/ delays via Hamburg, Frankfurt, Mannheim

regions.name: Heidelberg
regions.summary: Intro to Germany and family history through the Grimm family

days.notes: Arrived Heidelberg. Picked up by Günther + met family
EMBL w/ Bishoy, beautiful but foggy
Town + University library for working. Foggy again
Breakfast w/ Bishoy. Meetings @ DKFZ. Drive to Bürgstadt w/ Günther, walk Burg + Miltenberg in evening, eat @ The Giant (self proclaimed oldest restaurant in Germany)
Walk Bürgstadt. Val, Greta, Diana arrive. Drive to Gerolzahn and Reudental. Said Schneeball much to everyone's amuzement). Drive home to Heidelberg in eve
Relaxed day @ Grimm household. Files, ancestry tree, delayed Heidelberg walk for Valentin, walked Philosophenweg trail

regions.name: Munich
regions.summary: Rainy Bavarian weather for work and networking

days.notes: Train Heidelberg → München (9:13 AM–12:10 PM). Staying with Aliona and Nick. Made gumbo for dinner, settled in on foldout couch
Rachel and Brian into the city for remote work and sightseeing — Karlsplatz, Maxvorstadt. Worked out of Lost Weekend coffee shop. Met Irish professory for dinner at Spanish restaurant

Similar day. Cleaned Aliona + Nick's place while Rachel worked on paper and remote job application. Applied late to Fran's A-SOuRCCE postdoc at BRIC Copenhagen. Dinner with Anne-Sophie Pipen, Canadian expat postdoc (Aliona connection) re: Munich life and immigration

Early commute (~1 hr) to Helmholtz Munich to meet Matthias Heinig (PI) and students — hadn't had a native English speaker visit in a long time. Rainy, dreary return commute. Walked toward city center, hopped a tram, got off in a nice area, walked several miles back with photos and döner. Chatted with Aliona + Nick in evening
Train München → Praha (~11 AM–5:30 PM). Met Ammi and Lid at Airbnb near Vyšehrad/Pankrác. Subway to Vietnamese restaurant for dinner
Náplavka farmers market — mulled wine, halušky, other local favorites. Walked around the city: Vyšehrad, Old Town, Charles Bridge, Malá Strana, Prague Castle, Petřín Hill. 72-hour Lítačka pass
Prague with Ammi and Lid, Ammi takes lead.
Train Praha → Dresden (12:31–2:50 PM, direct). Stayed at Hotel Friedrichstadt
Dresden sightseeing (Zwinger, Frauenkirche). S-Bahn to Meißen, grandmother's streets, Markt, porcelain shops, and requested Omi's birth records from town hall. Train to Berlin in evening
Arrived Berlin evening. Kindred rental in Kreuzberg. Low energy day with lots of work from home
Explored Kreuzberg. Shopped for roller bag/carry-on (needed more luggage capacity and the old bag had worn to pieces
Train Berlin → Hamburg. Thrift stores in Schanzenviertel (2nd Fit, Vintage Revivals, Pick N Weight)
Train Hamburg → Copenhagen. Second longer stay with Ammi and Lid
Working from BII
Meeting with Ole Winther @ Biocenter. Emailed Tune Pers, Jordi Merino, Ana Cvejic
Networking at KU/CBMR. Met Din Selmanovic (Pers Group postdoc)
Return: CPH → LHR → RDU
